name: yahoo-shopping-mcp
description: Read-only Yahoo! Shopping product search through an MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Search Yahoo! Shopping products with a read-only MCP tool.
interface.longDescription: Search Yahoo! Shopping products by keyword or JAN code. The server validates bounded inputs, filters unsafe product categories and external URLs, and returns model-readable results plus an optional product carousel.
defaultPrompt: Search Yahoo! Shopping for desk lamps under 5000 yen and summarize price, seller, and availability.
Find a Yahoo! Shopping product by JAN code and show the matching result.
Compare Yahoo! Shopping products by price, seller, and stock status.
